hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; case "$FILE" in */_pages/*|*/_publications/*|*/_talks/*|*/_teaching/*) if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then head -1 "$FILE" | grep -q "^---" || echo "WARNING: This content file is missing YAML front matter (--- delimiter). Jekyll will not process it correctly."; fi ;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; case "$FILE" in */_publications/*) echo "REMINDER: Publication files require front matter: title, collection, permalink, excerpt, date, venue, paperurl, citation. Run make test-unit in tests/ to validate." ;; */_talks/*) echo "REMINDER: Talk files require front matter: title, collection, type, excerpt, permalink, venue, date, location." ;; */_teaching/*) echo "REMINDER: Teaching files require front matter: title, collection, type, permalink, venue, date, location." ;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; case "$FILE" in */_sass/*) echo "REMINDER: SCSS changed. Run regression tests to verify: cd tests && make test-regression" ;; */assets/js/_main.js) echo "REMINDER: _main.js changed. Run npm run build:js to regenerate main.min.js" ;; */_config.yml) echo "REMINDER: _config.yml changed. Restart Jekyll server (config is not hot-reloaded)." ;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; case "$FILE" in */_sass/*) echo "REMINDER: SCSS changed. Run regression tests: cd tests && make test-regression" ;; */assets/js/_main.js) echo "REMINDER: _main.js changed. Run npm run build:js to regenerate main.min.js" ;; esac; exit 0'
